articles.title: A room full of stars: Sanjoy Narayan writes on the Pitchblack Playback experience
articles.description: The idea of these deep-listening sessions is simple: A great album is played in full, in pitch dark, on a spectacular sound system, in collective silence.

articles.title: Saif Ali Khan | Rasika Dugal | Manish Chaudhari Interview
articles.description: In this conversation with Shreyas Pande, Saif Ali Khan, Rasika Dugal and Manish Chaudhari open up about their upcoming film, ‘Kartavya’, reflecting on their favourite crime-thriller tropes, Saif’s process of working on dialects, the advice he received from Amitabh Bachchan and Deepak Dobriyal, their thoughts on the current streaming landscape, and more

articles.title: Splitsvilla 16: Suzzane Calls Out Sadhaaf Shankar And Deeptanshu Saini's 'Fake Dating' - EXCLUSIVE
articles.description: Suszane opens up about the reality of Splitsvilla 16, revealing that Sadhaaf Shankar and Deeptanshu Saini’s dating was entirely fake. She exposes behind-the-scenes truths, highlighting how some relationships on the show are played for the cameras.

articles.title: Bad Bunny Asked Grace Ann Nader For Her Number At Met Gala 2026 But She Did Not Recognise Him
articles.description: Grace Ann attended the gala alongside boyfriend, Jack Jones.

articles.title: Chloe Cherry Reveals She’s Had So Much Lip Filler She Feels No Pain
articles.description: Euphoria star Chloe Cherry recently shared that she has become so familiar with the treatment that she no longer needs numbing cream before getting injections.

articles.description: Paper Tiger premieres on May 16 at the Cannes Film Festival.

articles.title: Today Breaking News | রাত ১১-টার বড় খবর | Suvendu Adhikari News | Vidhan Sabha News | ED News
articles.description: Today Breaking News | রাত ১১-টার বড় খবর | Suvendu Adhikari News | Vidhan Sabha News | ED News Abhishek Banerjee | তৃণমূল সাংসদ অভিষেক বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায়ের বিরুদ্ধে FIR।Suvendu Adhikari | বিধায়করা কে কী কাজ করছেন, কে বিধানসভায় যাচ্ছেন, সে ব্যাপারে স্বচ্ছতা রাখার কথা আগেই বলেছিলেন মুখ্যমন্ত্রী শুভেন্দু অধিকারী।আজ প্রথমদিনের বিধানসভা অধিবেশন থেকেই মুখ্যমন্ত্রী ঘোষণা করলেন, সাধারণ মানুষের জন্য বিধানসভার কার্যকলাপ লাইভ সম্প্রচারের ব্যবস্থা করা হবে। বিধানসভায় এক নতুন যুগের সূচনা করার বার্তাও দেন তিনি। Vidhan Sabha News | বিধানসভায় উত্তেজনা। বিজেপি-তৃণমূল স্লোগানযুদ্ধ। বিধানসভায় অধ্যক্ষ নির্বাচন। ওয়াকআউট তৃণমূল বিধায়কদের। বিধানসভার অধ্যক্ষ নির্বাচিত রথীন্দ্র বোস। ED News | জমি কেলেঙ্কারি মামলায় গ্রেফতার হয়েছেন কলকাতা পুলিশের DC শান্তনু সিনহা বিশ্বাস। বারবার তলবের পরও হাজিরা এড়ান। শেষ পর্যন্ত গতকাল হাজিরা দিতেই গ্রেফতার শান্তনু সিনহা বিশ্বাস। কে এই শান্তনু? তার বিরুদ্ধে কী অভিযোগ উঠে আসছে? n18oc_kolkataWatch LIVE updates from News18 Bangla covering West Bengal, Kolkata news. Today’s top headlines include Chingrighata metro construction, Kolkata Metro Orange Line, EM Bypass traffic news, Suvendu Adhikari latest news, illegal construction in Kolkata, Tiljala demolition update, Rathindra Bose Speaker oath, west bengal speaker oath ceremony, West Bengal Assembly session 2026, petrol diesel price hike, petrol price in kolkata, diesel price in kolkata, Kolkata Police DC arrested, Shantanu Sinha Biswas, PM Modi foreign visit, Russia-Ukraine War live, and Iran-America ceasefire news. articles.title: BMC warns of action against illegal water pump use amid 10% water cut
articles.description: BMC warns of criminal action, seizures and disconnections for illegal motor pumps drawing excess water during Mumbai’s 10% water cut until monsoon.

articles.title: “Aakhri baar khul kar roe kab the?”: Security guard’s emotional confession about daughter’s bidaai leaves netizens emotional
articles.description: A touching social media video captures a security guard's heartfelt confession about his daughter's wedding being the last time he cried openly. He spoke of the profound bond fathers share, considering daughters a special blessing who bring immense joy and good fortune. His emotional words resonated deeply, highlighting that fathers, despite their usual composure, experience profound emotions too.

articles.title: Sonu Nigam meets Piyush Goyal to discuss 'Sangeet Dwar' initiative
articles.description: Singer Sonu Nigam met Union Minister Piyush Goyal to discuss the 'Sangeet Dwar' initiative, a single-window platform for music licensing. The meeting was also attended by Anup Jalota and other prominent industry figures.

articles.title: Ganga Meenakshi: From Hunger on Streets to Stardom, Mother Shares Painful Past!
articles.description: Social media star Ganga Meenakshi's mother, Rajalakshmi, has opened up about her past. She spoke about how her first husband abandoned her, forcing her and the kids to live on the streets. It was Ganga's stepfather, Manoj, who finally gave them a new life.

articles.title: Subnautica 2 Sells 2 Million Copies Within 12 Hours of Early Access Launch
articles.description: Subnautica 2 has sold 2 million copies in just 12 hours after its early access launch. The survival title released in early access on May 14 on PC and Xbox Series S/X. Subnautica 2 has also reached...

articles.description: The reason why Aakhri Sawal works is because it refuses to give you easy answers. It makes you think and debate. It is a film that talks about the history and legacy of RSS

articles.description: Pati, Patni Aur Woh Do excels with a sharp script and strong performances. Directed by Mudassar Aziz, the film blends comedy with misunderstandings.

articles.description: Pati Patni Aur Woh Do movie review: Ayushmann Khurrana, Wamiqa Gabbi, Sara Ali Khan, Rakul Preet Singh film clothes it all in a modernity that can conceive women in jobs, women in open relationships, but not women whose life doesn’t revolve around a man.

articles.title: Mohanlal, Mammootty to Dulquer Salmaan; Malayalam film industry celebrates as VD Satheesan becomes Kerala’s new Chief Minister
articles.description: Malayalam cinema stars like Mohanlal, Mammootty, Nivin Pauly, and Dulquer Salmaan have congratulated VD Satheesan on his appointment as Kerala's new Chief Minister. The industry's prominent figures shared heartfelt wishes on social media, expressing optimism for the state's future development and leadership under Satheesan's guidance. Their messages highlight a significant political transition.

articles.title: 4 Zodiac Signs Could Experience Life-Changing Breakthroughs This Saturday, May 16, 2026
articles.description: Saturday, May 16, 2026, carries intense astrological energy that could completely shift the emotional, professional, and personal direction of certain zodiac signs. As powerful planetary alignments create a wave of transformation, some signs may suddenly experience clarity, breakthroughs, opportunities, or emotional turning points they did not see coming. What initially feels like confusion or sudden change may actually become the beginning of something far better. For four zodiac signs in particular, this cosmic shift could mark the start of a major new chapter.

articles.title: 'It was this way or the highway': Mouni Roy once gave Suraj Nambiar an ULTIMATUM over marriage
articles.description: In an interesting throwback, an interview with Suraj Nambiar has emerged, revealing that he hadn't initially envisioned marriage, with Mouni Roy's strong encouragement playing a pivotal role in their relationship. He reflected on the adjustments to his new life in Mumbai thanks to her help.

articles.title: Matt Reeves confirms cast of The Batman: Part II; Robert Pattinson returns, Sebastian Stan, Scarlett Johansson and others join lineup
articles.description: Matt Reeves has kicked off the cast reveal for The Batman: Part II, but in true Gotham style, the filmmaker chose a mysterious and cinematic approach instead of a standard announcement. Through a series of social media posts featuring clips from The Batman (2022), Matt Reeves confirmed the return of key cast members while teasing fans with cryptic messages.

articles.title: Your Girlfriend Web Series Part 1, Part 2 and Part 3 Now Streaming on Atrangii
articles.description: The popular your girlfriend web series is now available for streaming on the Atrangii OTT Platform. After the successful launch of Part 1 and Part 2, the makers have now released Part 3, continuing the intense romantic thriller story that has attracted attention among OTT viewers. Featuring Joshua Chhabra, Jyoti Sharma, Gunjann Aras, Nishant Vaidy, ... Read more

articles.title: Suriya's 'Karuppu' becomes the first film to call Vijay ‘CM’
articles.description: Suriya's 'Karuppu' finally hit screens on May 15 after a last-minute delay, sparking massive fan celebrations. The film made headlines by being the first to refer to actor Vijay as 'Chief Minister Joseph Vijay' in its title card. Stars Trisha, RJ Balaji, and Karthi surprised fans at Chennai's FDFS, adding to the festive atmosphere.

articles.title: Sanjay Dutt Starrer Aakhri Sawal Release Put On Hold In UAE: Report
articles.description: The movie, which was earlier reported to hit screens on May 8, will now arrive in theatres on May 15.

articles.description: JioHotstar has teased the Indian OTT release date of Dhurandhar 2 as film drops internationally on Netflix.

articles.title: Drake’s three new albums out now: Check list of tracks in ‘ICEMAN,’ ‘HABIBTI’ and ‘MAID OF HONOUR’
articles.description: Drake has announced a surprise triple album release. Fans were shocked when the rapper revealed HABIBTI, ICEMAN, and MAID OF HONOUR would all drop on May 15, 2026. This marks a significant event with dozens of new songs becoming available. The tracklists for all three projects are now public, generating considerable excitement among listeners.

articles.title: Stephen Colbert reveals the guest who left him flustered
articles.description: During a heartfelt segment on the 'Strike Force Five' podcast, Stephen Colbert recounted his most memorable blunder on 'The Late Show' involving the charming Michelle Williams, which left him momentarily speechless. He further divulged his admiration for Rachel Weisz and Andrew Garfield, reminiscing about an iconic kiss with Garfield that fans won't soon forget.

articles.title: Falaq Naaz on whether she regrets trolling Rahul Roy's music video: I will cringe content, cringe
articles.description: Falaq Naaz stood by her critique of Rahul Roy's viral music video, calling it "cringe content" despite his explanation about needing to "pay bills." Naaz insists her opinion remains unchanged, even after making a follow-up video to help Roy. She remains unfazed by online trolls, stating she did what felt right and has restricted comments on her social media.

articles.title: Amid OTT release buzz, 'Dhurandhar-The Revenge' make-up artist Preetisheel Singh DECODES Danish Iqbal's Dawood Ibrahim look
articles.description: Ranveer Singh's spy thriller, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge,' continues its theatrical success and has now launched on Netflix internationally, with an Indian release on JioHotstar pending. Makeup artist Preetisheel Singh revealed the intricate process behind Danish Iqbal's impactful portrayal of Dawood Ibrahim. The film's box office collection has surpassed ₹1,796 crore worldwide.

articles.title: Quote of the day by William Shatner: 'There was nothing lonelier than a man with a million...' Life lessons on friendship, love, human nature by Canadian actor known for playing Captain James T. Kirk in Star Trek films
articles.description: Quote of the day by William Shatner highlights loneliness, friendship, and human connection through the words “There was nothing lonelier than a man with a million friends.” This explainer covers quote meaning, relevance today, and life lessons while tracing the career, awards, and life journey of the Canadian actor known for Star Trek.

articles.title: 'Drishyam 3' advance booking: Mohanlal, Jeethu Joseph thriller crosses Rs 10 crore worldwide
articles.description: Anticipation for 'Drishyam 3' is soaring, with the Malayalam crime thriller already securing over Rs 10 crore in advance bookings globally. Directed by Jeethu Joseph and starring Mohanlal, the film continues Georgekutty's saga. The original Malayalam version releases May 21st, while the Hindi adaptation starring Ajay Devgn is slated for an October 2nd debut.

articles.title: Suriya, Karuppu Makers Issue First Statement After Announcing New Release Date: We Know This Wait Was...
articles.description: Karuppu is finally releasing worldwide on May 15. Following that, the makers took to social media to thank fans for their patience, with Suriya sharing a similar message on his page.

articles.title: Taylor Swift reportedly ditching traditional invitations to personally call guests for Travis Kelce wedding celebration
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are reportedly abandoning traditional wedding invitations in favor of private phone calls to guests as they prepare for a closely guarded summer wedding. Reports suggest Swift herself has contacted several celebrity invitees while keeping details like the date and venue secret. The strategy reflects the couple’s ongoing effort to maintain privacy despite intense public attention. Conflicting reports about locations in Rhode Island and New York City have only fueled speculation, while celebrity names linked to the bridal party continue drawing interest around the high-profile ceremony.

articles.title: Pete Davidson breakup? Split with Elsie Hewitt reported due to this reason, months after having baby
articles.description: Pete Davidson and Elsie Hewitt have reportedly parted ways months after the birth of their daughter.

articles.title: Why is Lindsey Vonn leaving California? Olympic skier drops Beverly Hills mansion price after painful comeback season
articles.description: Lindsey Vonn has lowered the price of her Beverly Hills mansion by $200,000 as she plans a permanent move to Park City, Utah. The Olympic skier has faced a difficult year after returning before the 2026 Winter Olympics while injured and later suffering a fractured leg. Vonn continues recovering from six surgeries while preparing for a new chapter away from California.

  8. Bhuvneshwar Kumar: भुवनेश्वर कुमारने इतिहास घडवला! 19 वर्षांच्या इतिहासात केवळ दुसऱ्यांदा घडला \'हा\' रेकॉर्ड, मुंबईचं स्वप्न भंगलं, RCBचा थरारक विजय

    Bhuvneshwar Kumar: भुवनेश्वर कुमारने मुंबई इंडियन्सविरुद्धच्या सामन्यात इतिहास रचलाय. संघाच्या 19 वर्षांच्या इतिहासात केवळ दुसऱ्यांदा घडलेली कामगिरी त्याने केली. Read More

  9. एक पॅड विघटित व्हायला लागतात 800 वर्ष; या दोन महिलांनी काढला भन्नाट पर्याय; आज कोट्यवधींची उलाढाल, नेमकं काय केलं?

    Menstrual Hygiene Day:प्रत्येक पॅडला विघटित होण्यासाठी 800 वर्षांपर्यंतचा कालावधी लागतो आणि त्यात चार शॉपिंग बॅग्सइतके प्लास्टिक असते. त्यामुळे पर्यावरणावर नकळतपणे भार पडतो. Read More

  10. EPFO : ईपीएफओच्या 7 कोटी खातेदारांसाठी गुड न्यूज, पीएफ क्लेम प्रक्रियेत मोठे बदल होणार, जाणून घ्या सविस्तर

    EPFO च्या खातेदारांना पीएफ खाते बंद करुन पूर्ण पैसे काढायचे असल्यास कित्येक महिन्यांची वाट पाहावी लागत होती. लवकरच यात मोठे बदल करण्यात येणार आहे. Read More

articles.title: Morning Brief Podcast: Can Bollywood's Big Boys Play The Microdrama Game?
articles.description: India's biggest production houses are moving into micro-drama — but entering a format is very different from mastering it. In this episode of The Morning Brief, host Anirban Chowdhury, ET's in house film journalist and critic Rajesh Naidu and AI-native micro drama platform Dashverse founder Sanidhya Narain examine three defining tensions in the micro-drama space: whether the format can genuinely serve as an IP testing ground for films and series, whether legacy studios have the structural DNA to compete in a high-volume, low-cost game, and whether China's ad-dominant revenue model can work in India's market. Listen in.

articles.title: Dialogue of the day from 3 Idiots: ‘Aaj dar mat Farhan... nahi toh 50 saal baad...’
articles.description: 3 Idiots is a 2009 coming-of-age satirical comedy-drama film directed by Rajkumar Hirani, produced by Vidhu Vinod Chopra, and written by Abhijat Joshi .
